text.message: I prolly have to go up on the coast
Can give you a couple cards, u go 9 4 11 down to 10 3 11
Think it’s a win win for us both yeah
but i trust u will help me out later
10 3 11 is good for me too, I just lose without any expansions that’s why
Yeah always down to help out
so you guys make a deal and I get reamed?
I think you have a killer setup red
You’ll be fine, I got you for trades too if you’d like
black, happy to help you plow him if possible
Black u want ur brick or wheat?
Not sure if I can do that yet
NO, you are on my 3:1 port
havent given me a lot of help blue lol
Lowkey think we shouldn’t be helping you as of now
I gave you the brick 1:1 that turn to settle 3 10 11
not for the card i wanted to give up
i woulda been better off goin 9 10 11 and getting wood port
No bruh u offered for ore straight up
and then i had to give ore since u not helpful
Cannot be feeding black army here
Clearly the deal worked in your favor
u said u gimme a couple of cards
i got plowed it rly hasnt
Black should have ignored Blue's advice, and Blue should have placed it on 10.11.3.
yeah, of course black is in first
His roads just rolled as well
Same as what you have with devs
A 4 roll is pretty bad here
where else i meant to put them
